A

addArmor(Armor) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add an armor object to the corresponding ArrayList
addConsumable(Consumable) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add a consumable object to the corresponding ArrayList
addEnemy(Enemy) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add an enemy object to the corresponding ArrayList
addEnvironment(Environment) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add an environment object to the corresponding ArrayList
addWeapon(Weapon) - Method in class SelectionController
Setter method to add a weapon object to the corresponding ArrayList
affectEnemy(Enemy) - Method in class Consumable
Method that applies the stat effects of the consumable to the enemy
affectEnemy(Enemy) - Method in class Environment
Affects the chosen enemy stat
affectPlayer(Player) - Method in class Consumable
Method that applies the stat effects of the consumable to the player
affectPlayer(Player) - Method in class Environment
Affects the chosen player stat
Armor - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Armor class, this class will be updated later on for MCO2.
Armor(String, String, int, int) - Constructor for class Armor
Constructor for the Armor class
attack(Player) - Method in class Enemy
Method for attacking the player object, attack damage is affected by enemy atk, player def, and the player's defending state

C

CLIViewer - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file that handles rudimentary displaying of information in the command line.
CLIViewer() - Constructor for class CLIViewer
 
Consumable - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Consumable class.
Consumable(String, String, int, boolean, boolean, String[], int[], int) - Constructor for class Consumable
Constructor for consumables that affect either the player or enemy
Consumable(String, String, int, String[], int[], String[], int[], int) - Constructor for class Consumable
Constructor for consumables that affect either the player or enemy
countAffectingTurns(Player, Enemy) - Method in class Consumable
Method to keep track of the amount of turns the consumable has remained active, once it reaches the same value as affectingTurns, it restores the stat effects
createEnemyEnvironmentDescription() - Method in class Environment
Generates a brief describing how the environment will affect the enemy during the battle
createPlayerEnvironmentDescription() - Method in class Environment
Generates a brief describing how the environment will affect the player during the battle

D

displayChoices() - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying possible player actions in a given turn
displayEndMainMenu() - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the ending prompt giving the player the option to quit or retry a new battle
displayGameBar() - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying current relevant combat data
displayMainMenu() - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the Main Menu of the game
displaySelection(String, SelectionController) - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the relevant selection of objects
displayTurnResult(String) - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the outcome of a given turn
displayWinner(String) - Method in class CLIViewer
Method for displaying the result of a given battle

E

Enemy - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Enemy Class, will later be updated in MCO2.
Enemy(String, String, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Enemy
Constructor method for the Enemy class
Environment - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the Environment class.
Environment(String, boolean) - Constructor for class Environment
Constructor for environments that have no special effect i.e.
Environment(String, boolean, int, String, int, String) - Constructor for class Environment
Constructor for environments that have a special effect, environments only affect 1 stat of the enemy and 1 stat of the player
equipArmor(Armor) - Method in class Player
Equips the chosen armor object
equipConsumable(Consumable) - Method in class Player
Equips the chosen consumable object
equipWeapon(Weapon) - Method in class Player
Equips the chosen weapon object
EventController - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file that controls the events currently running in the program.
EventController() - Constructor for class EventController
Constructor for the EventController Class

G

getAffectingTurns() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to determine if how many turns the consumable will remain active
getAffectsEnemy() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to determine if the consumable affects the enemy
getAffectsPlayer() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to determine if the consumable affects the player
getArmor() - Method in class Player
Getter method to retrieve the player's currently equipped armor object
getArmors() - Method in class SelectionController
Getter method to retrieve the armor objects stored.
getAttack() - Method in class Enemy
Getter method for the enemy's atk value
getAttack() - Method in class Player
Getter method to retrieve the player's current atk value
getAttack() - Method in class Weapon
Getter method for the weapon's atk value
getChargesLeft() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's current charges
getConsumable() - Method in class Player
Getter method to retrieve the player's currently equipped consumable object
getConsumables() - Method in class SelectionController
Getter method to retrieve the consumable objects stored.
getDefense() - Method in class Armor
Getter method for the armor's def value
getDefense() - Method in class Enemy
Getter method for the enemy's def value
getDefense() - Method in class Player
Getter method to retrieve the player's current def value
getDisplay() - Method in class EventController
Getter method to return the CLIViewer
getEnemies() - Method in class SelectionController
Getter method to retrieve the enemy objects stored.
getEnemyConsumableDescription() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's effect on the enemy
getEnemyEffectDescription() - Method in class Environment
Getter method for the description of the enemy effect
getEnemyStatEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to get the value of the enemy's stat effect
getEnemyStatToEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to get the specific enemy stat to be affected
getEnvironments() - Method in class SelectionController
Getter method to retrieve the environment objects stored.
getHasConsumeTemp() - Method in class Player
Getter method to determine if the player is capable of using another consumable
getHasEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to determine whether the environment provides a unique effect
getHitPoints() - Method in class Enemy
Getter method for the enemy's hp value
getHitPoints() - Method in class Player
Getter method to retrieve the player's current HP value
getIsCharging() - Method in class Player
Getter method to determine if the player is currently charging their attack
getIsDefending() - Method in class Player
Getter method to determine if the player is currently defending
getIsRunning() - Method in class EventController
Getter method to determine if the game is still running
getIsTemporary() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to determine if the consumable's effects are temporary
getMaxCharges() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's max charges
getName() - Method in class Armor
Getter method for the armor name
getName() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's unique name
getName() - Method in class Enemy
Getter method for the enemy's unique name
getName() - Method in class Environment
Getter method for the environment's name
getName() - Method in class Player
Getter method to retrieve the player's name
getName() - Method in class Weapon
Getter method for the weapon name
getPlayerConsumableDescription() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's effect on the player
getPlayerEffectDescription() - Method in class Environment
Getter method for the description of the player effect
getPlayerStatEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to get the value of the player's stat effect
getPlayerStatToEffect() - Method in class Environment
Getter method to get the specific player stat to be affected
getSelectionController() - Method in class EventController
Getter method to return the selection controller
getSpeed() - Method in class Enemy
Getter method for the enemy's spd value
getSpeed() - Method in class Player
Getter method to retrieve the player's current spd value
getSpeedPenalty() - Method in class Armor
Getter method for the armor's speed penalty
getSpeedPenalty() - Method in class Weapon
Getter method for the weapon's speed penalty
getTotalArmor() - Static method in class Armor
Static getter method for total armor count
getTotalConsumables() - Static method in class Consumable
Static getter method for the total enemy objects constructed
getTotalEnemies() - Static method in class Enemy
Static getter method for the total enemy objects constructed
getTotalEnvironments() - Static method in class Environment
Static method to get the total environment objects instantiated
getTotalWeapons() - Static method in class Weapon
Static getter method for total weapon count
getTurnCounter() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve how many turns have elapsed since the consumable was first used
getType() - Method in class Armor
Getter method for the armor type
getType() - Method in class Consumable
Getter method to retrieve the consumable's type
getType() - Method in class Enemy
Getter method for the enemy's type
getType() - Method in class Weapon
Getter method for the weapon type
getWeapon() - Method in class Player
Getter method to retrieve the player's currently equipped weapon object
getWeapons() - Method in class SelectionController

Method to manage the input coming in from the Main Menu

O

Method for displaying the last attack's value

P

Player - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file for the player class, the user's controllable fighter in the battle
Player(String) - Constructor for class Player
Constructor for the player object
playerChoice(Scanner) - Method in class EventController
Method for validating user input for their actions in the game, this includes error and exception handling

R

resetCharges() - Method in class Consumable
Method for resetting the charges of the consumable
retry(Scanner) - Method in class EventController
Method that allows the user to retry the battle or quit the program

S

selectArmor(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible armors the player can equip
selectConsumable(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible consumables the player can equip
selectEnemy(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible enemies the player can fight
selectEnvironment(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible environments to battle in
SelectionController - Class in Unnamed Package
Class file to control selections of weapon, armor, enemy, consumable, and environment objects.
SelectionController(CLIViewer) - Constructor for class SelectionController
Constructor method for the SelectionController
selectWeapon(Scanner) - Method in class SelectionController
Method for displaying the possible weapons the player can equip
setAttack(int) - Method in class Enemy
Setter method to change the enemy's current atk
setAttack(int) - Method in class Player
Updates the player's atk value
setChargeBase(int) - Method in class Player
Snapshots the player's current atk for charging to isolate it from any atk boosting effects in the turn
setDefense(int) - Method in class Enemy
Setter method to change the enemy's current def
setDefense(int) - Method in class Player
Updates the player's def value
setEnemy(Enemy) - Method in class CLIViewer
Setter for storing an Enemy object to access its information
setEnvironment(Environment) - Method in class CLIViewer
Setter for storing an Environment object to access its information
setHasConsumeTemp(boolean) - Method in class Player
Updates the player's current consumable usage
setHitPoints(int) - Method in class Enemy
Setter method to change the enemy's current hp
setHitPoints(int) - Method in class Player
Updates the player's health value
setPlayer(Player) - Method in class CLIViewer
Setter for storing a Player object to access its information
setSpeed(int) - Method in class Enemy
Setter method to change the enemy's current spd
setSpeed(int) - Method in class Player
Updates the player's spd value
stopCharging() - Method in class Player
Method for setting the player's charging state to false
stopDefending() - Method in class Player
Method for setting the player's defending state to false

T

think(char, Enemy) - Method in class Player
Method for the player to choose what they wish to do during their turn, the player can choose to do only one action per turn
turnSystem(char) - Method in class EventController
Method to control actual running battle

U

unequipArmor() - Method in class Player
Unequips the currently equipped armor
unequipConsumable() - Method in class Player
Unequips the currently equipped consumable
unequipWeapon() - Method in class Player
Unequips the currently equipped weapon
useCharges() - Method in class Consumable
Method that decrements the current amount of charges of the consumable
